title: StrategySummary
description: Publishable strategy performance summary payload derived from local strategy metadata and aggregated trade performance records.

strategy_id.description: Stable public identifier for the strategy summary record. Typically composed from the internal model and asset or another normalized unique strategy key.

asset.description: Tradable instrument or asset code associated with the strategy summary.

timeframe.description: Aggregation window or operating timeframe label for the strategy summary, such as `1h`, `4h`, `1d`, or a sync-defined period identifier.

win_rate.description: Percentage of trades in the reporting window that closed profitably.

profit_factor.description: Gross profit divided by gross loss over the reporting window.

drawdown.description: Maximum drawdown for the strategy over the reporting window, expressed in the normalized public performance unit chosen by the sync layer.

trade_count.description: Total number of trades included in the reported strategy summary window.
